title: The Zigzag Zealous Zebra
content:
The Zigzag Zealous Zebra,
    who carried five Monkeys on his back all
    the way to Jellibolee.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Zigzag Zealous Zebra"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
